FGO_RELIC_SUITCASE_FGO.title: Suitcase
FGO_RELIC_SUITCASE_FGO.description: At the start of combat, gain 20% NP.
FGO_RELIC_HALLOWEEN_ROYALTY.title: Mystic Code
FGO_RELIC_HALLOWEEN_ROYALTY.description: Every 5 turns, use Mystic Code's Master skill. Every 5 turns, use Mystic Code's Master skill(+).
FGO_RELIC_HALLOWEEN_ROYALTY.flavor: A prestigious and noble product. Now you can be the (Halloween) Crown Prince!
FGO_RELIC_COMMAND_SPELL.title: Command Spell
FGO_RELIC_COMMAND_SPELL.description: Command_Spell are the three absolute commands which can be used with the Right click in Battle.
FGO_RELIC_COMMAND_SPELL.flavor: Command Spells are extremely powerful magic granted to each Master.
FGO_RELIC_SURPRISE_CHOCOLATE.title: Surprise Chocolate
FGO_RELIC_SURPRISE_CHOCOLATE.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 random buff.
FGO_RELIC_SURPRISE_CHOCOLATE.flavor: The first time seems like just an attempt... let's do it again!
FGO_RELIC_LOCK_CHOCOLATE.title: Lock Chocolate
FGO_RELIC_LOCK_CHOCOLATE.description: Gain [E] at the start of your turn. At the start of combat, gain 1 Evil_Curse.
FGO_RELIC_LOCK_CHOCOLATE.flavor: Make a choice and give it to someone important to you.
FGO_RELIC_LOCK_CHOCOLATE_STRAWBERRY.desc: Upon pickup, add a Wall of Snow Flakes and Black Barrel to your deck.
FGO_RELIC_LOCK_CHOCOLATE_STRAWBERRY.flav: Carefully select the recipient of the gift.
FGO_RELIC_STARGAZER_TEAPOT.title: Stargazer Teapot
FGO_RELIC_STARGAZER_TEAPOT.description: Whenever you use a potion, gain 2 Guts.
FGO_RELIC_STARGAZER_TEAPOT.flavor: Drink it and deepen the bonds.
FGO_RELIC_LEYLINE_STONE.title: Leyline Stone
FGO_RELIC_LEYLINE_STONE.description: When you are about to be killed, avoid death and restore to 100% of max HP, gain 300% Noble Phantasm Gauge. (Only effective once)
FGO_RELIC_BLESSED_LOCK_ON_CHOCOLATE.desc:
Upgrades Mash's cards after defeating Bosses.
Act 1 Boss: NP upgrades to Lord Camelot, Wall of Snowflakes upgrades to Venerated Wall of Snowflakes, gain Obscurant Wall of Chalk.
Act 2 Boss: NP upgrades to Lord Chaldeas, Wall of Snowflakes upgrades to Venerated Shield of Snowflakes.
FGO_RELIC_POISON_APPLE.title: Poison Apple
FGO_RELIC_POISON_APPLE.description: Whenever you gain Block, apply 1 Poison to a random enemy.
FGO_RELIC_POISON_APPLE.flavor: An apple that looks suspicious no matter how it looks. The person who takes this and is willing to eat it must be a super good person.
FGO_RELIC_MISO_POTATO.title: Miso Potato
FGO_RELIC_MISO_POTATO.flavor: Smuggled from the ZHIFU Mountains and circulated as simple food on the black market.
FGO_RELIC_FAN_NIGHT.title: Fan Night
FGO_RELIC_FAN_NIGHT.description: Whenever you break an enemy's Block the first time each combat, heal for 20% of your MAX HP.
FGO_RELIC_DOUBLE_MUSCLE_BURGER.title: Burger King
FGO_RELIC_DOUBLE_MUSCLE_BURGER.descripti: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 40 and obtain a unique Curse.
FGO_RELIC_DOUBLE_MUSCLE_BURGER.flavor: Since protein can be converted into muscle, that's definitely 0 calories.
FGO_RELIC_DREAM_CHIP.title: Dream Chip
FGO_RELIC_DREAM_CHIP.description: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile the first time each combat, add a Calculated Gamble into your hand.
FGO_RELIC_DREAM_CHIP.flavor: A luxurious casino chip carrying dreams.
FGO_RELIC_COSMIC_MEDALLION.title: Cosmic Medallion
FGO_RELIC_COSMIC_MEDALLION.description: Whenever you lose HP during your turn, gain double that amount in Block.
FGO_RELIC_MIDSUMMER_NIGHT_DREAM.title: Midsummer Night Dream
FGO_RELIC_MIDSUMMER_NIGHT_DREAM.descript: You can no longer become Evil_Curse.
FGO_RELIC_MIDSUMMER_NIGHT_DREAM.flavor: While these visions did appear. And this weak and idle theme, no more yielding but a dream.
FGO_RELIC_SALEM.title: Salem
FGO_RELIC_SALEM.description: 每张领域外生命牌：回合开始获得2活力和暴击星。
FGO_RELIC_SKULL_CANDY.title: Skull Candy
FGO_RELIC_SKULL_CANDY.description: Upgrade your Mystic Code's Master skill.
FGO_RELIC_SKULL_CANDY.flavor: Candy that has been resold multiple times.
FGO_RELIC_ARCHETYPE_O_R_T.title: Archetype ORT
FGO_RELIC_ARCHETYPE_O_R_T.description: Converts your Invincibility to Anti-Purge_Defense. At the start of your 2nd turn and after each turn, gain 10 Stars and 3% NP.
FGO_RELIC_ARCHETYPE_O_R_T.flavor: A lifeform created (designed) by fusing ORT's heart with an extraterrestrial species.
FGO_RELIC_OBLIVION_CORRECTION.title: Oblivion Correction
FGO_RELIC_OBLIVION_CORRECTION.descriptio: At the start of each combat, gain 30% Critical.
FGO_RELIC_OBLIVION_CORRECTION.flavor: While humans are forgetful creatures, Avengers never forget.
FGO_RELIC_SELF_REPLENISHMENT_MAGIC.title: Self-Replenishment (Magic)
FGO_RELIC_SELF_REPLENISHMENT_MAGIC.descr: At the start of each turn, gain additional 6% NP.
FGO_RELIC_SELF_REPLENISHMENT_MAGIC.flavo: Mana continues to surge forth until vengeance is complete.
FGO_RELIC_B_B.title: BB
FGO_RELIC_B_B.description: At the start of each combat, gain Buff or Debuff. Buff: gain 2 Strength and Dexterity. Debuff: gain 1 Vulnerable, Frail or Weak.
FGO_RELIC_BOW_INSIGNIA.title: Bow Insignia
FGO_RELIC_BOW_INSIGNIA.flavor: A seal engraved with the Archer emblem.
FGO_RELIC_MECHANICAL_PROTECTOR.title: Mechanical Protector
FGO_RELIC_MECHANICAL_PROTECTOR.descripti: Whenever you play a Power card for 3 times, a random enemy Stunned. This relic has been used up.
FGO_RELIC_WING_BOOTS_FGO.title: Wing Boots
FGO_RELIC_WING_BOOTS_FGO.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Intangible.
